footnotes.text: So the chief Oriental versions. The Latin MSS. have deep.
The Syriac adds and the end will come.
The passage from verse [36] to verse [105], formerly missing, has been restored to the text. See Preface, page ix.
So the chief Oriental versions. The Latin MSS. have place.
So the chief Oriental versions. The Latin has will you speak.
The Latin has a bold day
So the Syriac and other versions. The Latin omits in the days of Saul.
